mapper.sql: id, job_id, process_id, process_seq, employee_id, employee_name, in_qty, out_qty, defect_qty, start_time, finish_time, is_outsource, outsource_id, create_by, create_time, remark
mapper.update: UPDATE t_erp_produce_job_process SET job_id = #{jobId}, process_id = #{processId}, process_seq = #{processSeq}, employee_id = #{employeeId}, employee_name = #{employeeName}, in_qty = #{inQty}, out_qty = #{outQty}, defect_qty = #{defectQty}, start_time = #{startTime}, finish_time = #{finishTime}, is_outsource = #{isOutsource}, outsource_id = #{outsourceId}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, remark = #{remark}, id = id WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_erp_produce_job_process WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_erp_produce_job_process WHERE job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY process_seq ASC
SELECT FROM t_erp_produce_job_process WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND finish_time IS NULL ORDER BY process_seq ASC LIMIT 1
